<MethodEndpoint
  method=&#123;"get"&#125;
  path=&#123;"/registry/search"&#125;
  context=&#123;"endpoint"&#125;
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Search definitions by keyword across id, namespace, and metadata.

Returns a paginated SearchResult with cursor-based pagination.
